case_title: SIU PING YOUNG VS. MAIN KAI LIU

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY YOUNG, SIU PING AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, MAIN KAI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, SIU PING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIU, MAIN KAI $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, $10,000 PLUS COSTS FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MC-025. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $500.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON 11/15/18 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED AUG-11-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, MAIN KAI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF SIU YOUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAIN KAI LIU IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY HIS OWN NON COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE TRANSLATOR, KEN LIU. CLERK G. FELICIANO ADMINISTERED THE INTERPRETER'S OATH TO KEN LIU. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
